data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add `clarity-check` subcommand to the ticket CLI dispatcher that wraps ticket-clarity-check.sh's heuristic clarity scoring.

**Why**: The ticket system should answer "is this ticket clear enough to plan?" without callers invoking a separate script.

**Scope**:
- IN: New `clarity-check` case in `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket` dispatcher routing to ticket-clarity-check.sh logic; integration test using a synthetic fixture exercising the subcommand through the dispatcher and asserting exit codes and text output match ticket-clarity-check.sh
- OUT: Migrating callers (Epic e1b2-2653); removing ticket-clarity-check.sh; changing clarity scoring heuristics

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, `ticket clarity-check <id>` is callable via the dispatcher and produces the same exit codes and text output as ticket-clarity-check.sh
  <- Satisfies: "clarity-check (heuristic clarity scoring -- replaces ticket-clarity-check.sh)"
- When this story is complete, the integration test exercises clarity-check through the CLI dispatcher against a synthetic fixture and asserts output equivalence with ticket-clarity-check.sh
  <- Satisfies: "Each new subcommand has an integration test asserting output equivalence"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] This story depends on S2 (df25-59f8) landing first to avoid parallel dispatcher edits

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a developer, I can score ticket clarity via ticket clarity-check <id>
